description: Letter from Avraham Maimonides to Ḥayyim b. Ḥananel. An autograph. A previous description called this "Three drafts of a letter sent by Shelomo to Hayyim." Published by P. B. Fenton, ‘A Judeo-Arabic Commentary on the Hafṭārōt by Ḥanan’ēl ben Šěmū’ēl (?), Abraham Maimonides’ Father-in-Law’, Maimonidean Studies, 1 (1990), pp. 27–56
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
